---
title: "adj_r_squared"
generated: true
description: "Per-element adjusted `R^2` (Gaussian)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:adj_r_squared -->
```python
adj_r_squared(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:adj_r_squared -->
Per-element adjusted `R^2` (Gaussian).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:adj_r_squared -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `GLMResult` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `V`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:adj_r_squared -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
